title: It Started in Naples
writer: Melville Shavelson, Jack Rose, Suso Cecchi D'Amico
actors: Clark Gable, Sophia Loren, Vittorio De Sica
plot: Days before his wedding, a Philadelphia lawyer travels to Naples in Southern Italy to settle the estate of his late brother, only to find that he has an Italian nephew who is being cared for by his maternal aunt, a cabaret singer.
